content.purpose: Test resonance dynamics: energy-gradient dynamics over dense codebooks.
content.method: Iterate energy-gradient descent from input toward codebook attractors.
content.result: KILLED. Energy-gradient dynamics converge to centroid blur, not class attractors. More iterations = worse (-34pp at 20 iterations).
content.key_insight: Iterative dynamics over dense, overlapping codebook regions average across class boundaries.
